# Process Reliabilism

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** 53cc9c96-1372-4fae-8fd5-9174e1406151
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Can beliefs be safe yet fail to constitute knowledge?](can-beliefs-be-safe-yet-fail-to-constitute-knowledge-antithesis-2e0724ac-09a8-4f94-80fd-addd66bb2905.md)

## Content

**A person knows a proposition if they have a true belief**, **A person knows a proposition if their belief is generated by a reliable cognitive process**, **A reliable process is one that generally produces true beliefs over false ones**
